DayDraft

Plan tomorrow with little brown-paper warmth and tidy repetition.

Loading date…

Plan

Plan tasks for tomorrow

Tap the quick buttons as many times as you need. They are designed for repetitive tasks. Custom is always open like a tiny side door.

Custom task
Tip: click any quick task button again and again to add repeated tasks, like breakfast twice, prayer, or work blocks.

Saved flow

Tomorrow’s task basket

Tasks are saved with tomorrow’s date, so your main page can show only the correct day later.

    Navigation

    Open your dashboard

    Your main page is where today’s tasks will appear with a progress bar.

    Go to index.html
